category_sources: Official Shibboleth OpenSAML documentation describes SAML libraries used by the Shibboleth project.
source_facts.description says OpenSAML is a library for Security Assertion Markup Language.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is opensaml; source_facts.description and official Shibboleth documentation use the display name OpenSAML.
docs_sources: Official Shibboleth wiki provides the OpenSAML-C page for the C++ library and the OpenSAML overview page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Shibboleth source-code documentation says public Git repositories are on Codeberg and migration notes list cpp-opensaml as an active repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies SAML; official Shibboleth OpenSAML pages describe SAML library usage for identity/security software.
